goal: Detect whether localhost:8000 is still the expected current model and decide whether chat-quality drift gates must run before release decisions.

next_gate_by_decision.fix_model_backend: fix localhost:8000 before judging chat quality
next_gate_by_decision.fix_harness: restart gateway/controller/proxies before judging model quality
next_gate_by_decision.fix_model_generation: fix localhost:8000 generation before judging chat quality
next_gate_by_decision.refresh_current_model_evidence: refresh current-model compatibility artifacts before release decision

must_not: promote a swapped model without drift proof
